evidence_summary: Establish the scale of Martian civilization through advanced irrigation infrastructure and transition the protagonist from curiosity regarding the landscape to profound grief upon receiving news of Dejah Thoris's death.

Carter travels through highly advanced agricultural tracts, observing the sophisticated irrigation systems of Mars. During his journey, he receives word from a noble that Dejah Thoris is presumed dead following recent conflicts with Tharks and Warhoons.
Carter observing the scale of the advanced agricultural tracts.
Carter processing the news of Dejah Thoris's presumed death.
Carter travels through irrigated fields and receives grim news via off-screen dialogue.
